name: Desire Grand Prix Invitation
desc:
​If this card is activated: You can add 1 "Buckle" Spell or 1 "Desire Driver" from your Deck to your hand.
Once per turn: You can halve your LP; discard 1 "Buckle" Spell from your hand, and send 1 "Desire Hero" monster from your Deck or face-up field to the GY, then Special Summon 1 Level 6 "Desire Hero" Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck.
"Desire Hero" monsters you control cannot be targeted by your opponent's card effects while they are equipped with a "Buckle" Spell.
You can only activate 1 "Desire Grand Prix Invitation" per turn.
